title: Let's Create!
description: Let's Create is all about the Create Mod and many of it's addons. Enjoy enhanced world generation and gameplay that focuses primarily on the building and automation possibilities of Create!
body:
This modpack aims to incorporate many of Create's addons, without branching too far away from the base game. Terrain generation is vastly improved, and there are some structure modifications to make the environment feel more open and natural. 

This pack is built by SouthernBoots for his Create series on YouTube.
